special_mechanics.name: Reverse Gravity (Planet Turvia)
special_mechanics.description: Gravity works in reverse on Planet Turvia. The protagonist is drawn upside down, as are enemies and the entire screen. Player can walk on ceilings and gravity effects are inverted.

special_mechanics.name: Cloner (Debug/Cheat Item)
special_mechanics.description: Spawns a copy of the player. Clones can move and jump like the player with separate HP. Multiple clones can be active simultaneously.

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources contain item/cheat data, story information, and level design notes, but no technical movement specifications. Game features gravity inversion mechanic as primary physics innovation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Adventures of Rad Gravity (unused content, items, debug data)
Wikipedia - The Adventures of Rad Gravity (game overview, mechanics description)
